title: Have you been affected by drug-facilitated sexual assault? | CNN
text:
A monthslongCNN As Equals investigationhas uncovered an online world where the commodification and amplification of sexual violence against women is flourishing.

If you have been affected by the issues raised in this report and have information you would like to share, you can do so below.

Help is availableFor help in the US, call the National Sexual Assault Hotline at 1-800-656-4673 or chat 24/7 ononline.rainn.org

Internationally, a worldwide list of directories is provided byUN Women, with national agencies onThe Pixel Project.

See Full Web Article
